serviceName.description: The name of your service (up to 255 characters).

cluster.description: The short name or full ARN of the cluster to run the service on.

taskDefinition.description: The family and revision or full ARN of the task definition.

desiredCount.description: The number of instantiations of the specified task definition to place and keep running.

launchType.description: The launch type on which to run your service.

platformVersion.description: The platform version that your tasks in the service are running on (Fargate only).

loadBalancers.description: A load balancer object representing the load balancers to use with your service.

schedulingStrategy.description: The scheduling strategy to use for the service.

healthCheckGracePeriodSeconds.description: The period of time, in seconds, that the ECS service scheduler ignores unhealthy Elastic Load Balancing target health checks after a task has first started.

enableExecuteCommand.description: Whether to enable Amazon ECS Exec for the tasks within the service.

role.description: The IAM role that allows Amazon ECS to make calls to your load balancer.

clientToken.description: An identifier you provide to ensure the idempotency of the request.
